title: Weapon XI
content:
{{SomethingElse|the Variant of [[Wolverine]]|Weapon X|Weapon X}} {{Otheruses|Deadpool}} {{CharHub|Weapon XI|Wade Wilson}} {{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=the 20th Century Fox Movies}} {{Character |image = Weapon XI Deadpool XMOW D&W.png |real name = {{ConjecNameAU|Wade Winston Wilson}}This character's full name is derived from a Variant from ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' and thus is conjecturally treated as the same. |alias = {{Alias |codenames = {{Conjecture|Weapon XI}}{{Ref|ConjecPVR}}
{{ConjecNameAU|Deadpool}}This character's codename is derived via visual appearance to a Variant from ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' and thus shares the same codename.}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|CAN}} |gender = Male |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' (flashbacks) |actor = [[Scott Adkins]] |status = Deceased}} '''{{ConjecNameAU|Wade Winston Wilson}}''' was an ex-Special Forces agent known as '''{{ConjecNameAU|Deadpool}}'''. He was experimented on and turned into a living weapon named '''{{Conjecture|Weapon XI}}'''. ==Biography== {{MD|Wade Wilson (Earth-18315)||1}} ===Killed by Deadpool=== [[File:Weapon XI Death (Deadpool 2 Archived Footage).png|{{AltFloat}}|Weapon XI is shot by [[Deadpool]]]] Weapon XI was present at the {{WPS|Three Mile Island Nuclear Generating Station}}, where he confronted [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Wolverine]] and prepared for a fight. However, before they could fight each other, Weapon XI was shot in the head by [[Deadpool]], who used [[Cable's Time-Travel Device]] to travel back in time and fix what he considered broken.{{Ref|DW}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Mutant Physiology''': ''To be added'' **'''Retractable Blades''': ''To be added'' ===Abilities=== ''To be added'' ==Relationships== ===Enemies=== *[[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Logan/Wolverine]] † *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Alternate Self and Killer ==Trivia== *In the comics, the Weapon XI program has no known outcome or subject of experimentation. {{WPS|Garrison Kane}} was initially intended to become Weapon XI, though he was later given the title of Weapon X along with Wolverine. *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Wade Wilson is a [[mutant]] who joined {{WPS|Team X (comics)|Team X}}. {{WPS|William Stryker}} soon took Wilson and experimented on him to have powers mirroring those of [[Cyclops/Mutant Genocide|Cyclops]] and [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Wolverine]], among others. Now as Weapon XI, Wilson was programmed to fight Wolverine only to be defeated. Later, another version of [[Deadpool]] used [[Cable's Time-Travel Device]] to go back in time and kill Weapon XI. *Footage of Weapon XI comes from the {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}} film ''{{WPS|X-Men Origins: Wolverine}}''. ==Behind the Scenes== *Weapon XI in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] references the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Scott Adkins]] and [[Ryan Reynolds (actor)|Ryan Reynolds]]. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Deadpool}} *{{Marvel|Wade Wilson (Earth-18315)}} *{{WP|Deadpool}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Deadpool]]
